title: A.B.E. Forgery
description: a mod adding powerful new weapons with unique effects
body:
The Anomalous Beings Exterminators is hiring! And we need you! Gear up with powerful new weapons with unique abilties and make us proud. 

Just no asking for a pay raise.
Ever.


<details>
<summary>Items</summary>
  
**Cursed Cleaver**
  : 
  
_The “Cursed Cleaver” a large and bulky sword that slams anyone unfortunate enough to get caught in its swing straight into the ground. It also allows people to jump freakishly high, and bring others with them? Not sure if it’s sentient or not like that old tome._
  
**Passive; Cleave** - Slams enemies into the ground upon melee hit.

**Special; Boost** - Holding right-click/use allows you to charge up a boost that boosts you and all entities within a 3-block radius upwards and into the air, longer charge = higher and stronger boost.


</details>

Download the A.B.E. datapack collection here:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/collection/283886/a-b-e/
https://modrinth.com/datapack/magworm
https://modrinth.com/datapack/bundle-o-many-things
